overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic urban commercial district. The player moves from a covered plaza with vivid purple and pink lighting through busy streets with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians, featuring reflective wet pavement and multi-level highway overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with neon signage and red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered plaza bathed in purple and pink neon light, approaching the street exit

entered.detail: overhead covering of the pedestrian plaza with structural beams
cylindrical modern building with reflective glass facade and horizontal red stripes
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging from overhead structures
large digital screen displaying animated character with blue background
large green-tinted digital billboard with white text and graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza illuminated by vivid purple and pink neon lighting. The camera moves forward past a curved glass building and red hanging lanterns, with digital billboards visible overhead. The ground consists of large concrete tiles, and a few pedestrians stand near shop entrances.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with moving traffic and sidewalk vendors

events.description: exits the covered plaza onto the open street with visible vehicle traffic and wet asphalt
futuristic red vehicle drives past on the multi-lane road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge and sidewalk, observing passing traffic and neon-lit building facades

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car with glowing elements driving past on the street

entered.detail: multi-lane street with wet reflective black asphalt surface
metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street level
street vendor stand with displayed magazines and pink neon lighting
red and white striped concrete barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered plaza to an open urban street with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights. The camera walks along a sidewalk bordered by a metal railing, passing a magazine stand. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane road, and the curved glass building from the plaza recedes into the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside busy street with overhead pedestrian bridges

events.description: slight acceleration while walking past street barriers and approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing under overhead structures and alongside building walls

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting buildings with glass sides and neon lighting
large digital advertisements mounted on the building wall showing various products
tall pole with horizontal neon light fixture illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a street railing, with multi-lane traffic passing on the right. Overhead pedestrian bridges span the street ahead, and large digital billboards cover the building walls to the left. The environment feels enclosed by the surrounding high-rise structures and overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with multi-level highway overpasses and crosswalks

events.description: begins crossing the wide intersection following a pedestrian in distinctive clothing
enters the center of the intersection with full view of the multi-level highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while following other pedestrians, with expansive views of the multi-level road network overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a blue hat and brown jacket walking ahead into the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with yellow zebra stripes and red border markings
massive elevated highway structure with multiple levels and support columns
complex network of elevated roads and ramps with glowing vehicle trails
distinctive character wearing blue headwear and brown jacket walking ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. The camera follows a pedestrian in a blue hat across the wide open space, revealing an impressive multi-level highway interchange overhead. The environment shifts from enclosed sidewalk to open plaza, with distant traffic and towering neon-lit structures visible in all directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit plaza into a sprawling, multi-level urban intersection. It begins within a covered area illuminated by vivid purple and pink lights, moving past a curved glass building and red hanging lanterns. As the camera exits the plaza, the scene transitions to an open street where wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon and futuristic vehicles glide past a sidewalk bordered by metal railings. The view then proceeds under the shadow of overhead pedestrian bridges and towering digital billboards, feeling increasingly enclosed by high-rise structures and overpasses. Finally, the environment opens up into a vast intersection with yellow crosswalks, following a pedestrian toward a massive multi-level highway interchange beneath a skyline of towering neon structures.
